GRUB_TIMEOUT=5
GRUB_DISTRIBUTOR="$(sed 's, release .*$,,g' /etc/system-release)"
GRUB_DEFAULT=saved
GRUB_DISABLE_SUBMENU=true
GRUB_TERMINAL_OUTPUT="console"
GRUB_CMDLINE_LINUX="crashkernel=1G-2G:192M,2G-64G:256M,64G-:512M resume=/dev/mapper/rlm-swap rd.lvm.lv=rlm/root rd.lvm.lv=rlm/swap init_on_free=1 pti=on vsyscall=none page_poison=1 audit_backlog_limit=8192"
GRUB_DISABLE_RECOVERY="true"
GRUB_ENABLE_BLSCFG=true

title Rocky Linux (5.14.0-611.5.1.el9_7.x86_64) 9.7 (Blue Onyx)
version 5.14.0-611.5.1.el9_7.x86_64
linux /vmlinuz-5.14.0-611.5.1.el9_7.x86_64
initrd /initramfs-5.14.0-611.5.1.el9_7.x86_64.img
options root=/dev/mapper/rlm-root ro crashkernel=1G-2G:192M,2G-64G:256M,64G-:512M resume=/dev/mapper/rlm-swap rd.lvm.lv=rlm/root rd.lvm.lv=rlm/swap init_on_free=1 pti=on vsyscall=none page_poison=1 audit_backlog_limit=8192 audit=0
grub_users $grub_users
grub_arg --unrestricted
grub_class rocky

llm_verdict.message: All remediation steps have been applied. The auditd service is now enabled, active, and will start on future boots. The system should now pass the OpenSCAP rule **service_auditd_enabled**.
